name: Buoy
description: Bright floats bobbing on a steady waterline — every redraw lifts and settles them to new heights on the swell.

code.style: --float: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --lift: @rand(-6%, 10%); --rule: ( --bd: @r(24, 46); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -2%; right: -2%; top: 62%; height: 2%; border-radius: 99px; background: var(--color1); opacity: 0.6; transition: ease 600ms; } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: calc(@var(--bd) * 1%); left: calc(50% - @var(--bd) * 0.5%); top: calc(63% - @var(--bd) * 0.5% - var(--lift)); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--float); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
